title: stigmaphyllon auriculatum
intro: Stigmaphyllon auriculatum, also known as the ear-leaved stigmaphyllon, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions due to their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stigmaphyllon auriculatum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared by boiling its leaves in water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding them into a powder for use in herbal remedies.
